hyperedges.label: SPL compile pipeline: Lexer → Parser → Analyzer
SPL run pipeline: Optimizer → Executor → WorkflowResult
text2spl + CodeRAG + config form the compiler subsystem
LLMAdapter Polymorphic Pattern all adapters implement async generate returning GenerationResult
RAG Pipeline code_rag_bridge and spl3_rag_bridge and VectorStore feed few-shot context into Text2SPL and SPLc compiler pages
Storage Backend Abstraction StorageConnection VectorStore MemoryStore each wrap a distinct dd library for unified SPL storage
Workflow CALL dispatch pipeline: CLI → Composer → Executor → Registry
Registry federation: LocalRegistry + HubRegistry → FederatedRegistry
Streamlit UI knowledge loop: SPL_UI → db + code_rag_bridge → CodeRAGStore
Deterministic SPL to Physical Target Transpiler Family
Codec Abstraction Layer (raw media to ContentPart dicts for LLM adapters)
RAG Pipeline Flow (index to search to inject as few-shot context)
All comparison tier functions participate in the multi-tier comparison engine interface
text2spl, splc, and Streamlit UI collectively implement the full DODA pipeline from human intent to physical artifact
ComparisonResult, GEDResult, and BERTScoreResult form the shared data type layer consumed by engine and report
